lesson.menu_desc: Can and Cannot (Ability) and Transport Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- Getting Around -- Can and Cannot (Ability) and Transport Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 9 -- Getting Around

listenings.text: Hello, let me tell you how I get around my city. I live near the center of Altamira. Every morning, I can take the bus to my office. The bus is cheap and the station is near my house. Sometimes I walk, because my office is not very far. I cannot drive a car yet, but I want to learn. On the weekend, I take the train to visit my family. I like to travel and see new places.

Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you about transport in my city. We have buses, trains, and taxis. Many people take the bus to work because it is cheap. You can buy a ticket at the station. The train is fast, but you cannot take it very late at night. I drive a bus every day, and I help people get around the city. I like my job because I meet many people.

extra_audio.text: Dienane leaves her house in the morning. She walks to the bus station. She buys a ticket. She takes the bus to her office. At night, she takes the train to visit her family.
